description: dnspython is a DNS toolkit for Python. It supports almost all record types, can be used for zone transfers, dynamic updates, messages, TSIG, EDNS, and more.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/dnspython && python3 dnspython.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/dnspython && python3 dnspython.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/dnspython && python3 dnspython.py --help`. DNS toolkit for Python (resolver, zone, TSIG, ...).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: DNS toolkit for Python (resolver, zone, TSIG, ...).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: DNS toolkit for Python (resolver, zone, TSIG, ...).
